mapper.sql: id, scene_code, scene_name, system_prompt, user_prompt_template, model, temperature, top_k, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.update: update `ai_prompt_template` set scene_code = #{sceneCode}, scene_name = #{sceneName}, system_prompt = #{systemPrompt}, user_prompt_template = #{userPromptTemplate}, model = #{model}, temperature = #{temperature}, top_k = #{topK}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
update `ai_prompt_template` set status = #{status}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select from `ai_prompt_template` where scene_code = #{sceneCode} and status = 1 limit 1
select from `ai_prompt_template` order by scene_code asc, id desc
